div.p: The final text of the proposed peace treaty, with two declarations by the Government of Japan and a protocol, dated August 13, was released simultaneously by its joint sponsors, the United Kingdom and the United States, at 4:00 p. m. August 15. For text, with revisions to the July 20 text, see Department of State Bulletin, August 27, 1951, page 349.
For revisions to the July 3 draft as of July 20, see circular telegram 57, July 18, page 1199.
For revisions to the draft of June 14 as of July 3, see circular telegram 9, July 3, page 1174.
For the draft of June 14, see page 1119.
